vite.label: Vite dev server
vite.hint: Import createProxyPlugin() and add it to plugins[] in vite.config.ts

express.label: Express
express.hint: Import registerProxy() and mount it with app.use() in your server entry

nextjs-app.label: Next.js App Router
nextjs-app.hint: File placed at app/api/proxy/route.ts - no extra setup needed

nextjs-pages.label: Next.js Pages Router
nextjs-pages.hint: File placed at pages/api/proxy.ts - no extra setup needed

cloudflare.label: Cloudflare Worker / Pages Function
cloudflare.hint: File placed at functions/api/proxy.ts for Cloudflare Pages, or deploy as a standalone Worker
